# Marfaak AI Security - XXE in SOAP ŕ̨equeş̂t

**WARN̂̊ING: This p̨̂ayloà̧d̊̀ tests X̧XE in S̨̧̊OĄ̊̀P r̈̈eq̧̃ué́̀st.**

<?xm̨l version="1.0" en̨̧cṍdiǹ́g="Û̧TF-8"?>
